body:
This PR refactors the TC surface by:
 - Removing some `AbstractSurfaceParameters` subtype outer constructors, and calling default constructors directly
 - Splitting `FixedSurfaceFlux` into two types: `FixedSurfaceFlux` and `FixedSurfaceFluxAndFrictionVelocity`, removing the no longer needed properties and type information
 - Changing subtypes of `AbstractSurfaceParameters` to have `ts`, a thermo state instead of `Tsurface` and `qsurface`
 - Changing `float_or_func` to `const_or_func`
 - Change `get_surface` to use `::AbstractSurfaceParameters`'s thermo state property
title: Refactor surface
